description: New CE migration in server/migrations/ adds default_contact_id uuid NULL to rmm_organization_mappings
Migration adds composite FK (tenant, default_contact_id) -> contacts(tenant, contact_name_id) ON DELETE SET NULL, mirroring the existing client FK
Migration adds index (tenant, default_contact_id)
Migration down() drops the FK, index, and column cleanly
Migration is Citus-safe: nullable ADD COLUMN + colocated FK; fall back to column+index only if a post-hoc FK is rejected on Citus
New shared helper resolveRmmTicketContactId(trx, tenant, { clientId, mappingDefaultContactId }) in shared/rmm/alerts/resolveContact.ts
Resolver returns the mapping contact when it exists, is active, and belongs to the client
Resolver falls back to clients.properties.primary_contact_id when no mapping contact is set
Resolver validates the fallback contact (active, belongs to client) and returns null when invalid or absent
Resolver runs entirely on the passed trx (no separate admin transaction)
CreateAlertTicketParams gains optional mappingDefaultContactId
createTicketForAlert resolves the contact and sets tickets.contact_name_id on insert
processRmmAlertEvent reads the org mapping's default_contact_id and passes it into createTicketForAlert
createTicketForAlertId selects default_contact_id from the org mapping and passes it through
Unmapped / no-mapping alert passes undefined mappingDefaultContactId so the client-default fallback applies
CreateHuntressTicketParams gains optional defaultContactId
createHuntressTicket resolves the contact and sets contact_name_id on insert
incidentProcessor passes mapping.default_contact_id to createHuntressTicket
Huntress incidentProcessor publishes TICKET_CREATED after the create transaction commits
Shared processRmmAlertEvent publishes TICKET_CREATED after its create transaction commits, only when a ticket was created
createTicketForAlertId publishes TICKET_CREATED after its transaction commits
Event uses TicketModelEventPublisher; payload carries tenantId/ticketId/source=provider; publish failures are swallowed and never break ticket creation
Append-note / status-update paths do NOT emit TICKET_CREATED (only the create path does)
RmmOrganizationMapping interface gains default_contact_id?: string
getHuntressOrganizationMappings selects default_contact_id
updateHuntressOrganizationMapping accepts default_contact_id (set and clear-to-null)
getNinjaOneOrganizationMappings selects default_contact_id
updateNinjaOneOrganizationMapping accepts default_contact_id (set and clear-to-null)
Huntress OrganizationMappingManager adds a Default Contact column using ContactPicker
NinjaOne OrganizationMappingManager adds a Default Contact column using ContactPicker
Contact picker options are filtered to the mapped client's contacts (clientId prop)
Contact picker is disabled when no client is mapped for the row
Selecting or clearing a contact calls the update action and updates the row state
Contacts are loaded via the existing contacts fetch action and passed to the picker
